name: Jianpu Technology Inc.
description: Jianpu Technology Inc. operates a leading open financial technology platform under the Rong360 brand, connecting users with an extensive spectrum of financial products and services. By leveraging digital technology, the company provides intelligent search and recommendation results to meet the needs of its diverse audience. Additionally, it enables financial and non-financial partners to enhance their efficiency and competitiveness by offering digital intelligence as a service, including data- and analytical-based risk management, intelligent marketing, and other integrated solutions. As it expands its FinTech+ ecosystem, the company remains dedicated to innovation in financial technology and digital transformation.
